title: Lemon Garlic Chicken and Rice
description: A light and citrusy Italian-inspired dish featuring chicken breast, garlic, and lemon, served with a side of flavorful rice.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and italian seasoning.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, squeeze the lemon juice over the cooked white rice and stir in some minced garlic.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the sliced chicken breast with the lemon garlic rice and enjoy!
